description.overview: The Pumi is an energetic Hungarian herding breed known for its corkscrew curls and terrier-like ears.
description.temperament: Pumik are highly intelligent, energetic, and vocal. They excel at herding and dog sports.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to hip dysplasia and patellar luxation.
description.exercise: Very high energy. Need extensive daily exercise and mental challenges.

verdict.summary: Energetic Hungarian herders with distinctive curly coats. Pumik are intelligent and excel at sports but need lots of exercise and bark readily.
